name: Amoxicillin
description: Awọn oogun aporo ajẹsara aminopenicillin gbooro. Awọn oogun ajẹsara ti ẹnu fun ikolu ọgbẹ. Apakan ti idii egbogi ija TCCC fun prophylaxis ọgbẹ ni awọn ipalara ti kii ṣe pataki.
indications: Ilana ikọlu ọgbẹ (awọn ọgbẹ kekere-iwọnwọn, idii oogun ẹnu)
dose: 500 miligiramu PO ni gbogbo wakati 8 x 7 ọjọ (ọgbẹ prophylaxis). 875 mg PO ni gbogbo wakati 12 ni yiyan.
window: Bẹrẹ laarin awọn wakati 3 ti ipalara fun prophylaxis ọgbẹ.
contraindications: Aleji penicillin ti a mọ (lo doxycycline dipo)
warnings: Ti o ba jẹ inira penicillin: aropo doxycycline 100mg PO BID.
Ona ẹnu nikan -- lo awọn egboogi IV (cefazolin/ciprofloxacin) fun awọn ọgbẹ ti o lagbara tabi ti ẹnu ko ba farada.

pediatric.dose: 25-45 mg / kg fun ọjọ kan pin q8h (max 500 mg / iwọn lilo). Lo itọkasi Broselow orisun iwuwo.

obstetric.note: Ailewu ninu oyun. Ayanfẹ ju doxycycline (eyiti o jẹ contraindicated ni oyun).

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / TCCC Combat Pill Pack
